title: Excalibur | Bosses of Mass Destruction (BOMD) Support
description: A darker vision of ancient titans
body:
![Items](https://i.imgur.com/k6wL6HM.png)

![Blocks](https://i.imgur.com/0nEQ0FL.png)

This **unofficial** compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Bosses of Mass Destruction Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction)[/Neoforge](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction-forge) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**

*     A full-scale transformation that redesigns everything from mobs and bosses to items, particles, boss bars, and user interface.

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**

*     Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
*   Barribob – Creator of _Bosses of Mass Destruction_

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰
